hero.sub: Each piece is handcrafted with love, tradition, and an artistic soul — made to match your outfit, your culture, and your celebration.

story.quote: "Every wall frame, every painting, every shelf in our home — she made it all with her own hands, with a beautiful touch." — Smitarani's mother
story.p1: Smitarani Mishra's love for art and craft began in childhood — a spark so natural that everything she touched became beautiful. Long before it was a business, it was simply who she was.
story.p2: She began by making jewellery for herself, quietly and joyfully. When her friends noticed — and began asking her to make pieces for them — the love spread. Word after word, piece after piece, what began as a personal hobby turned into something that touched the lives of hundreds of women across India.
story.p3: Today, Smitarani's creations are not just jewellery — they are wearable art, each one carrying the warmth of the hands that made them. Her work has been recognised with the prestigious Ananya Award, a testament to her craft and her heart.

contact.footerTag: Handcrafted jewellery by Smitarani Mishra — where art, tradition, and love come together in every single piece.

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.text: I ordered a custom set for my wedding reception and it was beyond my expectations. Smitarani understood my vision perfectly!

reviews.name: Ankita Das
reviews.text: The Sambalpuri earrings I got are absolutely stunning. You can feel the love and care in every bead.

reviews.name: Meenakshi Nair
reviews.text: Got a custom potli bag and necklace set for my sister's engagement. The result was just magical!
